tabConfigDesc1: Set the preset tweak according to your needs and select the TCP algorithm you want.
tabConfigDesc2: Secure your DNS queries with encrypted DNS providers. Choose a trusted resolver below.
tabConfigDesc3: Increase network speed by disabling netstats and optimizing wifi connectivity.
tabConfigDesc4: Force IPv4 routing to prevent IPv6 DNS leaks, routing issues, and high latency in games.
tabConfigDesc5: Restricts background data and limit internet speed to only 1mb/s.
tabIsolateDesc: Block internet access for specific apps to prevent background data usage and interruptions.
tabBoostDesc: Prioritize network traffic for specific games or apps to reduce latency and ping drops.
